title: balanophora tobiracola
intro: Balanophora tobiracola, also known as the Japanese balanophoroid or Japanese balanophora, is a type of parasitic plant that belongs to the family Balanophoraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Japanese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Balanophora tobiracola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of dried roots, which are then decocted in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
